title: Kaavalann | Episode 30 | காவலன் | Thanthi One | 4th Jul 2026
description:
#Kaavalan #CrimeDrama #ThrillerDrama #SuspenseThriller #ThanthiOne 

A 16-year-old youth Lavan suddenly goes missing and the police are thrown with conflicting theories on his case. Life seems perfect for Mahesh 17, a bright student and a loving son of ASP Vedha and Cookbook writer Maya. But Nanda whom Mahesh claims to be his best friend has other plans for him.
